prompts.name: status
prompts.description: Inspect the current workspace and summarize what is active, dirty, or blocked.
prompts.insertText: Check status in {workspace}. Summarize what matters first and cite evidence.

prompts.name: plan
prompts.description: Read the relevant plan/docs, then propose the next implementation slice with risks.
prompts.insertText: Read the relevant plan/docs in {workspace}, then propose the next implementation slice with risks and verification.

prompts.name: review
prompts.description: Review the current changes for bugs, regressions, missing tests, and operational risk.
prompts.insertText: Review the current changes in {workspace}. Prioritize bugs, regressions, missing tests, and operational risk.

prompts.name: vault-log
prompts.description: Draft an AI Vault and master-plan progress entry for the current session.
prompts.insertText: Draft an AI Vault daily note and master-plan progress entry for this session. Ask before writing.

prompts.name: dashboard-next
prompts.description: Continue Dashboard V4 from the plan and verify the running control surface.
prompts.insertText: Continue Dashboard V4 in {workspace}. Read /root/DASHBOARD_V4_PLAN.md and /root/DASHBOARD_V4_AGENT_PAGES_PLAN.md, implement the next narrow slice, run bun run check, verify control-surface.service, and update AI Vault plus the master plan.

prompts.name: newsbites-dev
prompts.description: Continue NewsBites development using the local plan and deploy workflow.
prompts.insertText: Continue NewsBites development in {workspace}. Read the current NewsBites plan/context, make the next focused change, run the relevant checks, and do not manually set article status to published.

prompts.name: newsbites-debug
prompts.description: Debug the live NewsBites app and produce verified fixes.
prompts.insertText: Debug the NewsBites issue in {workspace}. Reproduce with local commands or browser checks, identify the smallest fix, run lint/build as appropriate, and summarize evidence.

prompts.name: mimule-ops
prompts.description: Inspect Mimule/OpenClaw gateway, Telegram behavior, and stack runbooks.
prompts.insertText: Work on Mimule/OpenClaw operations in {workspace}. Read the local SOUL/AGENTS/MEMORY context before edits, verify service/container state, and end with exact evidence plus next steps.

prompts.name: pipeline-status
prompts.description: Check editorial pipeline queue, current story, blocked stages, and model routing.
prompts.insertText: Check the editorial pipeline from {workspace}. Inspect the queue, current story, waiting approvals, recent errors, and model/GPU health. Report facts separately from inference.

prompts.name: paperclip-agents
prompts.description: Inspect Paperclip agent health, logs, and orchestration state.
prompts.insertText: Inspect Paperclip in {workspace}. Check docker compose state, recent logs, agent definitions, and any blocked editorial actions. Avoid credential output.

prompts.name: stack-status
prompts.description: Check the whole MIMULE/TechInsiderBytes stack from root plans and live services.
prompts.insertText: Check stack status from {workspace}. Use /root/CLAUDE.md and /home/agent/MIMULE_MASTER_PLAN_V3.md as context, inspect live service health, and return a prioritized operator summary.

prompts.name: imagen
prompts.description: Generate an image using Gemini's imagen capability. Describe what you need visually.
prompts.insertText: Use Gemini's imagen to generate an image. Describe the scene, style, composition, and any text requirements precisely.

prompts.name: video
prompts.description: Generate a video using Gemini's Veo capability. Describe motion, scene, and duration.
prompts.insertText: Use Gemini's video generation to create a video clip. Describe the scene, motion, camera work, and duration precisely.
